comments.text: a better upper bound of $h(n) \ll N^{\log(3)/\log(22)+o(1)}$ follows from the methods in: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2307.06914. the point is, you can take products of Behrend-style colorings to get a $N^{o(1)}$-coloring which kills all patterns except the symmetric ABBA-pattern. and then by tensoring the explicit coloring at the bottom of page 2, you can use $O(N^{\log(3)/\log(22)})$ colors to kill ABBA. as the linked paper discusses, getting subpolynomial bounds on this ABBA problem would have implications for a conjecture of Ruzsa (see Theorem 1.7). (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
